beginner.title: Beginner DSA Roadmap
beginner.description: Start your DSA journey from scratch! This roadmap covers all fundamental concepts you need to crack coding interviews at top tech companies. Follow the steps in order for best results.

steps.title: Programming Fundamentals
steps.desc: Variables, Data Types, Loops, Conditionals, Functions, OOP basics

steps.title: Time & Space Complexity
steps.desc: Big O Notation, Best/Average/Worst Case, O(1), O(n), O(log n), O(n²)

steps.title: Arrays
steps.desc: Array operations, Two Pointers, Sliding Window, Prefix Sum, Kadane's Algorithm

steps.title: Strings
steps.desc: String manipulation, Palindrome, Anagram, Pattern Matching, Sliding Window

steps.title: Searching Algorithms
steps.desc: Linear Search, Binary Search, Search in Rotated Array, First/Last Position

steps.title: Sorting Algorithms
steps.desc: Bubble Sort, Selection Sort, Insertion Sort, Merge Sort, Quick Sort

steps.title: Hashing
steps.desc: Hash Maps, Hash Sets, Frequency Counting, Two Sum Pattern

steps.title: Recursion
steps.desc: Base Cases, Recursive Thinking, Fibonacci, Factorial, Tower of Hanoi

steps.title: Stacks & Queues
steps.desc: Stack Operations, Queue, Valid Parentheses, Next Greater Element

steps.title: Practice & Interview Prep
steps.desc: Solve 50+ Easy problems on LeetCode, Focus on patterns, Mock interviews

advanced.title: Advanced DSA Roadmap
advanced.description: Master advanced topics in Data Structures and Algorithms. Deep dive into graph algorithms, dynamic programming, advanced trees, system design, and competitive programming patterns.

steps.title: Advanced Graph Algorithms
steps.desc: Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, Topological Sort, Strongly Connected Components

steps.title: Advanced Dynamic Programming
steps.desc: Bitmask DP, Digit DP, Tree DP, Interval DP, Matrix Chain Multiplication

steps.title: Advanced Trees
steps.desc: AVL Trees, Red-Black Trees, Segment Trees, Fenwick Trees, Trie

steps.title: System Design Basics
steps.desc: Load Balancers, Caching, Databases, CDN, Message Queues, Microservices

steps.title: String Algorithms
steps.desc: KMP, Rabin-Karp, Z-Algorithm, Suffix Arrays, Aho-Corasick

steps.title: Randomized Algorithms
steps.desc: QuickSelect, Reservoir Sampling, Skip Lists, Bloom Filters

steps.title: Competitive Programming
steps.desc: Number Theory, Combinatorics, Game Theory, Math Algorithms, Bit Manipulation

steps.title: Design Patterns
steps.desc: Singleton, Factory, Observer, Strategy, Decorator, LRU Cache Design

steps.title: FAANG Interview Prep
steps.desc: Mock Interviews, 150+ Hard LeetCode Problems, Behavioral Questions, System Design Rounds

steps.title: Competitive Programming Contests
steps.desc: Codeforces, LeetCode Weekly Contests, Google Kickstart, ICPC Preparation
